title: Extravagant Delight
description: A flavourful Farmers Delight addon that adds fruits and crops.
body:
![Mod Logo 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a8677dd44bbc0af66dd6b4e6a091eff4e10e193.png)

Requires [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight).

Extravagant Delight is a Farmer's Delight addon based on suggestions made by my friends and integrate them with other Farmers Delight addons. I recommend [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) for recipe viewing.

## Content

The first new Crop that you can find in the wilds is **The Starfruit**, in the wilds appears in patches of grass but it needs sand if you want to grow them.

![Starfruit Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e11eae195799d04ba95a5f624d09daa0becb4f57_0.webp)

A new wild tree also joins the Savanna, in the Savannas you can rarely find **The Quince** trees, the fruit of them is a very sweet treat if you know how to cook them.

![Quince Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6323424ec5731911ab0cac09d25345d866e79dab_0.webp)

In the Dark Forests you can find a new plant of the berry families, **The Sloe Berry**. Cooked well can make some interesing treats!

![Sloe Berry Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022357362e7921535236e7bf39d6d911f7ca18f4_0.webp)

As you can see in the Images, the mod also has Compats with **Brewin' and Chewin'**, **Hearth and Harvest** and **Neapolitan**!

![Compats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d48fb4a3777f9a1be22e9419787d793411c3d82c_0.webp)

## **1.1 The Brewer Dream Update 🍺**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Brewer Dream** is a update meant to be played with **Brewin and Chewin** Mod!
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51d08f9784ee51d5a305d5a4637dd9d8241dbecb_0.webp)

The first one is the **Barley**! A new crop that is found in the Deserts, it can grow in normal farmland.

![Barley Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97828d29c2cfdc2f55cb9a3e24eaa28032a18676.jpeg)

Found in the Snowy Biomes... the **Hops**! They can be used primarily in **Brewin and Chewin** but it also got their own foods!

![Hops Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/240bbd5609a59c773d16ec8ffeb2cef2017b8bcc.jpeg)

In the dephts of the Flower Forest the **Rhubarb** waits foryou arrival.

![Rhubarb Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67db13d6de279f69cb433922f3462dc658526c09.jpeg)

**Muscadine Grapes** bushes appears in the floors of the Nether Wastes and Basalt Deltas.

![Muscadine Grapes Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f91ad462f004573903047c91b4bae94f2db6992.jpeg)

In the Lush Caves a glowy figure can be seen, the **Lush Mango** Tree!

![Lush Mango Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/848bcd1ba0b8892a906b95a2aa65c52023df3f8b.jpeg)

In the Warped Forests a new vine can be found, the **Grapefruit**!

![Grapefruit Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8964741c95c3e4729c83a10e9a94faece0e66c84.jpeg)

Two new Crafting Stations were added, the **Stomping Vat** and the **Frozen Dessert Maker**.

![New Crafting Stations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbebd18a7ab856b5f09583b8ef1988e042aa7d5d.jpeg)

The **Stomping Vat** shows the ingredients that are placed and to craft the items you need to stay inside the Vat 10 seconds! Some recipes also requires having an item in the hand to be valid, you can use JEI to see the recipes!

The **Stomping Vat** can be turn in automatic mode placing a hopper below.

They also have interactions depending the Hopper Positions:
- Hopper on the Top and Back Side: Inputs items.
- Hopper on the Sides: Inputs a Required Item (Wooden Jug or Bottles as an example)
- Hopper on the Bottom: Turns the Block in to automatic mode and grabs the recipe result.

![Sweet Berries in the Stomping Vat (not a valid recipe, just an example)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86079dace94e63f9ebb0375bfac4f8bb2c24f383.jpeg)
![Automated Stomping Vat (it changes texture and deals damage if someone is inside)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22493fae952a28bfb561c633f49687e0049e0aae.jpeg)

The **Frozen Dessert Block** is another Complex Recipe Block, it turns ingredients in frozen and cold desserts, fully compatible with Neapolitan Recipes and their addons (If not, they are easily configurable through data recipes).

To use this block you need to follow these steps:
- Shift Right Click to open the **Dessert Maker**.
- Input the ingredients in the 9 slots and Container item in the container slot(Container Item are defined in the recipes, use JEI to figure it out)
- Close the **Dessert Maker** and if the block makes a breaking ice sound and particles, it means its working.

You can interrupt the crafting, the progress is paused if you do so.

You can Automate this Block putting Hoppers, it has some curious integration with them:
- Hopper on the Top: Inputs the ingredients.
- Hopper on the Sides: Inputs the Container Item.
- Hopper on the Bottom: Takes the crafted Item

![Closed Frozen Dessert Maker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40727f713d6575b4dc071128c8ad8c4871a8ad85.jpeg)
![Opened Frozen Dessert Maker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/276707e2244ccd55ec809f8c915a440289f05e1e.jpeg)

Finally these two Blocks looks like this when they are automated!

![Automated Blocks (ignore the Grapefruit Tree please)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfb77f1b758254d31aa1d422f27bffad8d9fabc7.png)

More Compats (Now fully compatible with **Cosmopolitan**)!

![New Compats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6924a85485da56d8ba2b583de55db2e9e607dd4_0.webp)

</details>

## **Extravagant Coasters**

You like the Ice Cream Coaster models? Dont worry, the mod has an integrated optional Resource Pack adding missing models to the coasters! (At the moment has compat with **Neapolitan**, **Atmospheric**, **Collectors Reap**, **Hearth and Harvest**, **Veggies Delight**, **Seasonals**, **Peculiars**, **Delightful**, **Exquisito**, **Seed Delight**, **Sunflower Delight**, **Twilight Delight** and **Respiteful**)

![Coasters Compats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cc8ffcf2b8f8190ab9546cf879bb3354e3abbb2_0.webp)

An additional resource pack were made for **Cosmopolitan Tweaks** resource pack that changes some textures from other mods, this resource pack is separately found called **Extravagant Coasters - Cosmopolitan**. If you only want the Cosmopolitan Coaster Models, just put this resource pack below the **Extravagant Coasters** resource pack.

## Extra Credits

[Brewin' And Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin) authors, some textures based on the mod, and integrated Compat with the mod, it utilizes some of the code and art when the compat is active.

**Permission:**

![Mod Author permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc1305bdbf9bea858a7f456047bd438279afef67_0.webp)


</details>

Gumillea - [Cosmopolitan](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmopolitan), i used some of their textures as a base.

## Info and Terms

You **CAN** add my mod to your Modpacks, it is made for them. **You cant sell the Modpack.**
